summary: Comprehensive testing of FB-feed style contact detail page redesign. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with all new features verified on desktop and mobile.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was returning 500 for invalid ObjectId. Now returns zeros gracefully.

contact_hero_section.details: Avatar with initials, name, phone number displayed correctly

touchpoint_badge.details: Badge on avatar shows total touchpoints count (8)

time_in_system_counter.details: Shows '0d days IN SYSTEM' for new contacts

quick_actions.details: All 6 buttons rendered: SMS, Call, Email, Review, Card, Congrats

activity_feed.details: Displays 8 events with icons, titles, descriptions, timestamps

edit_mode.details: Edit button toggles to Save button, shows form fields, Tags section, Delete button

view_conversation_link.details: Link shown with 'Open full message thread' subtitle

mobile_responsiveness.details: All features display correctly on mobile (390x844)

seed_data_creation: 5+ sample events pre-seeded for test contact. Additional test events created during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FB-feed style contact detail page fully implemented and tested. Backend events router added at /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events and /stats. Frontend page at /contact/{id} shows hero section, stats row, quick actions, activity timeline, and edit mode. Fixed invalid ObjectId handling in stats endpoint. All features working on desktop and mobile.
mocked_api: None. All APIs live against local MongoDB.
